creator: bsd-unix@embarqmail.com
text:
Seems like the weekly archiving of mailing list isn't working.  As an
example: http://docs.freebsd.org/mail/current/freebsd-ports.html

There are over 2 weeks of mails displaying and 20140223 is the last
archive of mail: http://docs.freebsd.org/mail/archive/2014/freebsd-ports/

How-To-Repeat: View: http://docs.freebsd.org/mail/current/freebsd-ports.html
as an example for all lists.
